text.message: Can’t really make a better 1st spot then that
yeah that first pick is beautiful
it ebbs and flows - sometimes you get first and think meh, other times wow
is a good spot, but the dice will talk
black can we figure something out with the brick port pls
Im probably going for it. Brick port is my only real path to ore
Without it I don’t think I have a chance at cities. My wheat is low too
ill leave it to you but would appreciate a nice trade or something
dont want to mess up each others game!
when i get a brick, trading it for a wheat would be lovely please
0 wheat right now but I’ll try
okay please can we do next as that brick port is huge
I will trade you one. I didn’t think I had promised the first one or anything like that
blue can i get a wheat nb
sorry oj it will rob you auto for me to block back
Don’t let my 4 points fool you lo
I will get to 5 quick but getting cities or dcards will be very hard
you will get road for sure
I do have a good chance at that yeah
Even with that though, that’s still only 7. I have no ore and low wheat
if you get out to to that bottom area you are chilling tbh
I would not get to the 10 ore until I was already at 9 points
This is red v blue if orange is really gone
i dont think so yet my friend
if i move the robber you will trade me brick?
be careful black, blue has a nice port and 6 5 9 city
ive been lucky with sheep rolls not sure i keep devs long term
you can easly double play red
will do next if you want
Going to take my chance with the bot here
black takes 7 with road and has 5 villages, i have 3 and 5 points with army, which blue may well beat me to
i need to stop blue from popping to have any chance
if i pop not settle here can you help me settle later?
otherwise it is getting cooked for me
I have brick sheep and wheat now
you are puntting black on 9 here
I took these trades to pay back
I’ll be trading these sheep in to get the cards back I traded lol
dude we are goign to loose
i just moved it off of 8
I traded those sheep back for wheat
red you gave black the win
i made a mistake on something
I broke less then even on those trades
i was never going to take army
The trades helped me in the sense that it kept you from army
But I traded 3 wheat for 4 sheep
and then traded those sheep back for 2 wheat
the mistake i made is i thought i could mono ore but i had already used knight that turn
My dog messed the whole house
Cleened all and wanted to play one
Watch Orange be on 9 and win lol
But just about any roll will do it
i was going to take army and win lol
